title: Litobrochia contracta

The plant is also known by its synonym, Gymnosporia contracta. The classification of Litobrochia contracta is further divided into its kingdom, as a Plantae, and its order, as an Apiales. The classification system used for Litobrochia contracta is based on the binomial nomenclature system developed by Carl Linnaeus.
